error_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + toIntervalDay(30) SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

latency_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + toIntervalDay(30) SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + toIntervalDay(30) SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

query_metric_log.engine: ENGINE = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY (event_date, event_time) TTL event_date + toIntervalDay(30) SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
